overview: A web app for uploading Fountain-formatted screenplays and conducting a table read with distinct, customizable voices per character. Features Kokoro TTS (82M ONNX model) as primary voice engine, a dedicated Voice Studio tab for creative voice configuration, sticky playback controls with smart skip-back, and auto-scrolling script display.
features: Fountain screenplay upload and formatted display
Kokoro TTS (onnx-community/Kokoro-82M-v1.0-ONNX) primary voice engine with Web Speech API fallback
Voice Studio tab with color-coded character cards and per-character voice/pitch/rate/language controls
Sticky playback controls with smart 2-second skip-back rule
Click any screenplay line to start playback from that point
Auto-scroll and highlight tracking current TTS snippet
Distinct randomized default voices for all characters
Provider selector for future TTS engine extensibility
